title: Syracuse center William Kyle signs with Los Angeles Lakers
summary: Syracuse University basketball player William Kyle III signed as an undrafted free agent with the Los Angeles Lakers. This article concerns Syracuse University athletics and has no direct relevance to City of Syracuse municipal operations, innovation initiatives, or departmental functions.
